annotations.title: But prove.
annotations.text: <mn>◦</mn> Though we may not extinguish the spirit, nor contemn the prophets, yet we must beware we be not deceived by giving too light credit to every one that vaunteth himself of the spirit, as Arch-heretics ever did. we must try them by the doctrine of the Apostles & the Spirit of the Catholic Church, which cannot beguile us.

notes.text: Not rashly to credit every spirit.
